basics.name: Daniel Ilies
basics.label: Full-Stack Engineer | Java • React • Node.js
basics.summary: Full-Stack Engineer with ~4 years of production experience in backend Java and frontend React/Vue.js development. Delivered page-load improvements, a Chrome extension with 90%+ accuracy, and automation tools that won a company innovation contest. Operating as independent contractor via PFA; available for remote roles.

work.name: GreenSoft
work.summary: Backend Java development on an EU government project, working within a professional software team.
highlights: Developing and maintaining Java-based backend services for an EU government project relying on Form.io for dynamic form management.
Implemented CAPTCHA and email verification logic conditionally based on user authentication state.
Proposed and built a reusable, config-driven form component adopted as team standard.
Contributing to full software development lifecycle including code reviews, testing, and Agile ceremonies.

work.name: Trood
work.summary: Promoted from intern to Software Engineer; contributed production features on the Rizq Launcher MVP.
highlights: Built gRPC-based TTS module and Telegram Bot-Client across Go, Node.js, and Java, demonstrating multi-stack proficiency.
Delivered end-to-end production features for Rizq Launcher MVP in Trood Go monolithic backend.
Collaborated on Next.js UI integration and solved complex authorization issues including reliable 2FA management.

work.name: BigFoot Company
work.summary: Built AdsMriia full-stack retargeting platform using Nuxt.js/Vue 3/TypeScript as most senior engineer on a young team.
highlights: Built core UI and multi-step workflows using Nuxt 3, Vue 3, Vuetify, and Pinia.
Mentored junior developers and established CI/CD pipeline practices as most senior engineer.
Ensured responsive design and cross-browser compatibility.

courses: Bachelor Thesis: Building a Modern Fullstack Web Application

awards.title: 1st Place Innovation Contest
awards.summary: Won for 'Otis' automation tool that streamlined templating and email workflows.

projects.name: IT-Hub – MERN Stack Social Media Web Application
projects.description: Full-stack social platform (MERN) demonstrating end-to-end development from React UI to Node/Express APIs and MongoDB schema.
highlights: Implemented authentication, posts, likes, and collaboration features.
Applied Redux and component-based architecture across the frontend.
Containerized application with Docker for consistent development and deployment environments.
